steps.title: Spot the defining clue
steps.content: The key signal is in the second note: “wanted to better understand the mechanics.” This directly phrases the research team's primary goal.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The correct answer directly states this goal—the team “wanted to better understand the mechanics” of bird nests' uniquely flexible yet cohesive structural properties.

The other three options describe research methods, findings, or nest characteristics, not the aim itself.

That is the correct answer.
